featured.name: AimSync WebRadar
featured.description: Live Counter-Strike 2 web radar — reads game memory on your PC and streams match data (players, bomb, grenades, round info) to a browser radar. Single-exe AIO build, 44 maps, LAN sharing, and in-game overlay (WIP).

featured.name: CS2 Crosshair Studio
featured.description: Crosshair studio for CS2 with live canvas preview, 100+ pro player configs, in-game CSGO- share codes, console export, and autoexec.cfg generator with categorized settings.

featured.name: CS2 Logitech No Recoil
featured.description: Logitech G Hub Lua script for Counter-Strike 2 — per-weapon recoil compensation for M4A4, M4A1-S, and AK-47 with sensitivity scaling, live G-key tuning, and Scroll Lock indicator.
